scripts.dev: concurrently -k "VITE_ENABLE_ACTIVITY_LOGGER=false VITE_EMBED_ACTIVITY_LOGGER=false corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @timetracker/web dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort --mode desktop" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && TIMETRACKER_DESKTOP_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 TIMETRACKER_EMBED_ACTIVITY_LOGGER=false env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron ."
scripts.dev:embedded: TIMETRACKER_EMBED_ACTIVITY_LOGGER=true node scripts/prepare-agent.cjs && concurrently -k "VITE_ENABLE_ACTIVITY_LOGGER=true VITE_EMBED_ACTIVITY_LOGGER=true corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @timetracker/web dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173 --strictPort --mode desktop" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && TIMETRACKER_DESKTOP_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 TIMETRACKER_EMBED_ACTIVITY_LOGGER=true env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron ."
scripts.start: node scripts/run-renderer.cjs build && node scripts/run-renderer.cjs start
scripts.start:embedded: node scripts/run-renderer.cjs build --embedded && node scripts/run-renderer.cjs start --embedded
